name: Jingliu
desc: Former Sword Champion of the Luofu, and the creator of the Cloud Knights' legends of undefeated might.\nNow, her name has been wiped from the records, and she is a traitor of the Xianzhou walking on the fine line between sanity and mara-struck.

1.name: Moon Crashes Tianguan Gate
1.desc: When using her Ultimate or Enhanced Skill, Jingliu's CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). If only one enemy target is attacked, the target will additionally be dealt Ice DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Jingliu's ATK.

2.name: Crescent Shadows Qixing Dipper
2.desc: After using Ultimate, increases the DMG of the next Enhanced Skill by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Halfmoon Gapes Mercurial Haze
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Lunarlance Shines Skyward Dome
4.desc: During the Spectral Transmigration state, the ATK gained from consuming teammates' HP is additionally increased by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the total HP consumed from the entire team. The cap for ATK gained this way also increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Night Shades Astral Radiance
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Eclipse Hollows Corporeal Husk
6.desc: When Jingliu enters the Spectral Transmigration state, the Syzygy stack limit increases by 1, and Jingliu obtains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of Syzygy. While she is in the Spectral Transmigration state, her CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

121201.name: Lucent Moonglow
121201.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's ATK to one designated enemy.
121201.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one designated enemy target.

121202.name: Transcendent Flash
121202.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's ATK to one designated enemy and obtains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Syzygy."
121202.simple_desc: Deals Ice DMG to a target enemy and obtains <color=#f29e38ff>1 stack of Syzygy</color>.

121203.name: Florephemeral Dreamflux
121203.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's ATK to one designated enemy, and deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's ATK to any adjacent enemies. Gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Syzygy" after attack ends.
121203.simple_desc: Deals massive Ice DMG to a target enemy and deals Ice DMG to adjacent targets. Obtains <color=#f29e38ff>1 stack of Syzygy</color>.

121204.name: Crescent Transmigration
121204.desc: When Jingliu has <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of Syzygy, she enters the Spectral Transmigration state with her action advanced by <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak> and her CRIT Rate increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color>. Then, Jingliu's Skill "Transcendent Flash" is enhanced to "Moon On Glacial River," and only this enhanced Skill is available for use in battle. When Jingliu uses an attack in the Spectral Transmigration state, she consumes HP from her teammates equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of their respective Max HP (this cannot reduce teammates' HP to lower than 1). Jingliu's ATK increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of the total HP consumed from all allies in this attack, capped at <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of her base ATK, lasting until the current attack ends. Jingliu cannot enter the Spectral Transmigration state again until the current Spectral Transmigration state ends. Syzygy can stack up to 3 times. When Syzygy stacks become 0, Jingliu will exit the Spectral Transmigration state.
121204.simple_desc: When possessing <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> stacks of Syzygy, Jingliu enters the Spectral Transmigration state with her <color=#f29e38ff>action advanced by <unbreak>100%</unbreak></color>, her CRIT Rate increased, and her <color=#f29e38ff>Skill becoming enhanced</color>. Using an attack in this state consumes HP from her teammates and <color=#f29e38ff>increases Jingliu's ATK</color> according to the total HP consumed. When Syzygy stacks become 0, exits the Spectral Transmigration state.

121206.name: Attack
121206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

121207.name: Shine of Truth
121207.desc: After using this Technique, creates a Special Dimension around Jingliu that lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> seconds, and all enemies in this Special Dimension will become Frozen. After entering combat with enemies in the Special Dimension, Jingliu immediately regenerates <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> Energy and obtains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of Syzygy, with a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of Freezing enemy targets for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). While Frozen, enemy targets cannot take action, and receive Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of Jingliu's ATK at the start of every turn. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
121207.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension around this unit. Enemies within this dimension will become <color=#f29e38ff>Frozen</color>. After entering combat with enemies in the dimension, this character regenerates Energy and gains 1 stack of "Syzygy" with a high chance to <color=#f29e38ff>Freeze</color> enemies.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

121209.name: Moon On Glacial River
121209.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's ATK to one designated enemy, and deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's ATK to adjacent enemies. Consumes <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Syzygy." Using this ability does not consume Skill Points.
121209.simple_desc: Deals Ice DMG to one designated enemy target and Ice DMG to adjacent targets. Consumes 1 stack of "Syzygy."

1.point_desc: While in the Spectral Transmigration state, increases Effect RES by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
After using "Transcendent Flash," the next <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1.point_desc: While in the Spectral Transmigration state, increases DMG dealt by Ultimate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

descs: Abilities now deal DMG based on <color=#f29e38ff>Max HP</color>
When a teammate's HP gets reduced, Jingliu <color=#f29e38ff>increases CRIT DMG, and gains "Syzygy"</color>
After entering the "Spectral Transmigration" state, <color=#f29e38ff>increases Syzygy's stack limit and additionally gains 1 stack of "Syzygy"</color>

1.name: Moon Crashes Tianguan Gate
1.desc: When using Ultimate or Enhanced Skill, Jingliu's CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Moreover, additionally deals 1 instance of Ice DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Jingliu's Max HP to the primary target.

2.name: Crescent Shadows Qixing Dipper
2.desc: After using Ultimate, increases the DMG of the next Enhanced Skill by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.name: Halfmoon Gapes Mercurial Haze
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Lunarlance Shines Skyward Dome
4.desc: During the "Spectral Transmigration" state, each "Moonlight" stack additionally increases CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Night Shades Astral Radiance
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Eclipse Hollows Corporeal Husk
6.desc: When Jingliu enters the "Spectral Transmigration" state, the "Syzygy" stack limit increases by 1, and Jingliu additionally gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Syzygy." During the "Spectral Transmigration" state, her Ice <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

1121201.name: Lucent Moonglow
1121201.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's Max HP to one designated enemy.
1121201.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one designated enemy.

1121202.name: Transcendent Flash
1121202.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's Max HP to one designated enemy and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Syzygy."
1121202.simple_desc: Deals massive Ice DMG to one designated enemy and gains <color=#f29e38ff>1 stack of "Syzygy"</color>.

1121203.name: Florephemeral Dreamflux
1121203.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's Max HP to one designated enemy, and deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's Max HP to adjacent targets. Gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Syzygy" after the attack ends.
1121203.simple_desc: Deals massive Ice DMG to one designated enemy and deals Ice DMG to their adjacent targets. Gains <color=#f29e38ff>1 stack of "Syzygy"</color>.

1121204.name: Crescent Transmigration
1121204.desc: When Jingliu has <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> stacks of "Syzygy," she enters the "Spectral Transmigration" state with 1 extra stack of "Syzygy" gained, her action advanced by <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak>, and her CRIT Rate increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color>. Then, Jingliu's Skill "Transcendent Flash" is enhanced to "Moon On Glacial River," and only this enhanced Skill is available for use in battle. When Jingliu uses an attack in the Spectral Transmigration state, she consumes HP from her teammates equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of their respective Max HP (this cannot reduce teammates' HP to lower than 1). During the "Spectral Transmigration" state, when ally targets receive DMG or consume HP, Jingliu gains 1 stack of "Moonlight." Each "Moonlight" stack increases Jingliu's CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>, stacking up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s). Jingliu cannot enter the "Spectral Transmigration" state again until the current "Spectral Transmigration" state ends. "Syzygy" can stack up to 4 times. When "Syzygy" stacks become 0, Jingliu will exit the "Spectral Transmigration" state and remove all "Moonlight." After ally targets receive DMG or consume HP for a total of <unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak> times, Jingliu gains 1 stack of "Syzygy." Each attack received by each target is only counted once.
1121204.simple_desc: When possessing <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s) of "Syzygy," Jingliu enters the "Spectral Transmigration" state with her <color=#f29e38ff>action advanced by <unbreak>100%</unbreak></color>, her CRIT Rate increased, and her <color=#f29e38ff>Skill enhanced</color>. Using an attack in the "Spectral Transmigration" state consumes HP from her teammates. And when ally targets receive DMG or consume HP, Jingliu's <color=#f29e38ff>CRIT DMG increases</color>. When "Syzygy" stacks become 0, exits the "Spectral Transmigration" state.

1121207.name: Shine of Truth
1121207.desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension around this unit that lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> seconds. All enemies in this Special Dimension will become Frozen. After entering combat with enemies in the Special Dimension, Jingliu immediately regenerates <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> Energy and obtains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Syzygy," with a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of Freezing enemy targets for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). While Frozen, enemy targets cannot take action, and take Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of Jingliu's Max HP at the start of every turn. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
1121207.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension around this unit. Enemies within this dimension will become <color=#f29e38ff>Frozen</color>. After entering combat with enemies in the dimension, this character regenerates Energy and gains 1 stack of "Syzygy" with a high chance to <color=#f29e38ff>Freeze</color> enemies.

10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1121209.name: Moon On Glacial River
1121209.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's Max HP to one designated enemy, and deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jingliu's Max HP to adjacent targets. Consumes <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Syzygy." Using this ability does not consume Skill Points.
1121209.simple_desc: Deals massive Ice DMG to one designated enemy and Ice DMG to adjacent targets. Consumes 1 stack of "Syzygy."

1.point_desc: While in the "Spectral Transmigration" state, increases Effect RES by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, and increases the Ultimate DMG dealt by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.
After using "Transcendent Flash," additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy. And after using "Moon On Glacial River," additionally regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy.
Upon obtaining "Syzygy," if its stack limit has been reached, Jingliu's next attack ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the target's DEF.
